name: Apple-Rhubarb Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Put rhubarb and apple pie filling in a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
2. Mix sugar and Jello; sprinkle over the rhubarb.
3. Sprinkle cake mix over that and sprinkle water over all.
4. Slice butter on top of the cake mix.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream. Serve cold if you're lucky enough to have any left.
